qa_pair.question: Read metadata for Contact and summarize number of fields and document label.
Run metadata doctor and return total issue count plus first three issue messages.
Generate metadata sync plan for two incoming objects and classify each action as create or update.
Validate a hook script containing import statements and return validation failure reasons.
List all access metadata objects and return their ids and names.
Read namespace metadata and identify whether mcpUserEnabled and mcpAdminEnabled are configured.
Simulate update payload for view metadata and report expected validation checks before save.
Simulate update payload for access profile metadata and report expected persistence result shape.
Run hook upsert with script comments and return why it is rejected.
Provide a namespace patch preview for SMTP and webhook keys and explain required admin guard.
